data.body:
Done — commit b1565a99. DD evidence:
- DD1: Contract doc at docs/designs/create-dso-app-template-contract.md enumerates all 4 interface surfaces (URL, placeholders, post-clone steps, test fixture) ✓
- DD2: Audit found one divergence (test fixture stub created app/ instead of src/app/). Trivial fix applied in-PR (no separate bug filed; real-URL e2e gap is tracked in 068c-1e8a and delivered by sibling story 6bf8-858d) ✓
- DD3: All 45 existing test-create-dso-app.sh tests still pass after the fixture update; review gate passed score=5 ✓
